scenes.name: Land on visualizer
scenes.note: Let the homepage breathe: centered canvas, dark theme, and the control dock along the bottom establish this as a live audio visualizer.

scenes.name: Hover Load audio CTA
scenes.note: Draw attention to the primary entry point for bringing in a track.

scenes.name: Notice upload-first workflow
scenes.note: Viewer should notice the app is ready for a dropped or loaded audio file before any visualization starts.

scenes.name: Hover Mic option
scenes.note: Show the alternate live microphone input path without triggering any permission prompt.

scenes.name: Notice dual audio sources
scenes.note: Call out that the product supports both uploaded tracks and live mic input.

scenes.name: Click Wave mode
scenes.note: Switch from the default Bars mode to demonstrate one of the alternate visualization styles.

scenes.name: Notice mode switch
scenes.note: Viewer should notice the selected mode chip changes, hinting at instant visual mode swapping.

scenes.name: Click Radial mode
scenes.note: Continue the tour by showcasing another visualizer mode option.

scenes.name: Notice variety of modes
scenes.note: Emphasize that the interface offers multiple creative renderers from the same control strip.

scenes.name: Click Particles mode
scenes.note: End the mode tour on a more expressive option to suggest depth across all seven modes.

scenes.name: Notice selected particles mode
scenes.note: Viewer should register the active-state change and the breadth of mode choices available.

scenes.name: Click first palette chip
scenes.note: Demonstrate one-click palette switching using the color chips in the bottom toolbar.
